dct_title_s: Geographische beschryving van t'beloofde-landt Canaan, doorwandelt van onsen heere ende Salichmaecker Jesu Christo neffens sÿne Apostelen : van nieus gecorigeert ende seer verbetert
dct_description_sm: Coordinates approximate and based on Greenwich meridian.
2 bar scales on map given in "Duytsche mylen" and "Uren gaens".
Shows topography, drainage, territorial boundaries of the tribes of Israel, travel routes, places of historical interest.
Features illustrations of ships throughout and a compass rose.
Decorative title cartouche with illustrations of biblical references.
Descriptive text, e.g.: Dese kaerte wert gestelt voor het evangelium Matthei.
